description: Run a control panel cabinet meeting: VP brings direct reports weekly; each covers their specific domain from a shared control panel of metrics and risks; decisions and cross-team asks are logged. Leadership operating rhythm, not a status dump.

examples.context: VP brought directs weekly. Each covered their control panel slice. Cabinet rhythm, not only fires.
examples.resolution: Shared picture. Cross-team issues surfaced early. Exec surprises down.

examples.context: Meeting became status read with no decisions.
examples.resolution: Every slice required one ask or one risk. Hour useful again.

examples.context: Support red on panel depended on another direct's staffing.
examples.resolution: Cross-ask logged with due date. Fixed in two weeks without hallway war.
